properties.displayName: AUTO DISABLED DEL0057 - IPs Sospechosas Activando Multiples Reglas
properties.description: The alert rule was disabled due to too many consecutive failures. Reason: This rule was automatically disabled due to insufficient permissions. The rule requires permissions which are different from those held by the user who created the rule at the time of rule creation. This often happens due to changes in functions used or references to external data. Please edit and re-save the rule with a user that can execute the query in it. For troubleshooting guidance, see: https://aka.ms/AnalyticsAutoDisabledRules Identifica IPs que activan múltiples reglas OWASP en poco tiempo, indicando escaneo, fuerza bruta o ataques automatizados.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "APPLICATIONGATEWAYS"
| where Category == "ApplicationGatewayFirewallLog"
| where action_s == "Detected"
| extend RuleId = tostring(parse_json(Message).ruleId)
| extend RuleName = tostring(parse_json(Message).details[0].message)
| extend RuleGroup = tostring(parse_json(Message).ruleGroup)
| where RuleGroup in ("OWASP_3.2", "Microsoft_BotManagerRuleSet_0.1")  // Filtrar por reglas relevantes
| where ruleId_s startswith "91"  // Filtra solo reglas que comienzan con "91" 
| where ruleId_s startswith "92"  // Filtra solo reglas que comienzan con "92" 
| where ruleId_s startswith "93"  // Filtra solo reglas que comienzan con "93" 
| where ruleId_s startswith "94"  // Filtra solo reglas que comienzan con "94" 
| where ruleId_s startswith "20"  // Filtra solo reglas que comienzan con "20" 
| where ruleId_s startswith "Known-CVEs"  // Filtra solo reglas que comienzan con "Known-CVEs" 
| summarize Count=count(), RuleList=make_set(RuleName), UniqueRules=dcount(RuleName) by clientIp_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| where UniqueRules >= 2  // Solo muestra IPs que activaron más de 1 regla en 5 minutos
| order by Count desc
